settings.privacy_text: Autorizzo DECEIT al trattamento dei miei dati personali per finalità di marketing e promozione, secondo il D.Lgs. 196/2003 e il Regolamento UE 2016/679 (GDPR). Informativa completa
settings.privacy_error: Devi accettare il trattamento dei dati

settings.subtext:
DECEIT is an Italian dailywear brand founded in 2022.

Conceived, designed, and produced in Southern Italy, the project explores the relationship between truth and self-deception through collections born from collaborations with artists, illustrators, and designers.

Each garment is designed to be worn every day and to tell a story about the person wearing it.

↳ Discover the new SS26 collection.

Crafted with an artistic vision. Decēit creates unisex designs that celebrate individuality.

Follow us: @deceit.deceit

Follow us: @deceit.store
